main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/2.02|2.02]] |gameversion=2.02 |date=March 17, 2026 |summary='''Alex Release'''. Balance changes for all characters. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20260317 Patch Notes] }} == Alex Patch == * Alex released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''{{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} Overheads:''' now universally {{sf6-adv|P|+1 on Block}} ({{sf6-adv|M|-3}} normally) with enough block pushback to prevent an immediate Throw or low-hitting light chain (e.g. {{clr|L|2LK}}~{{clr|L|2LP}}) ** Only applies to standard overhead command normals that can lead to grounded combos on hit ** Frame Data changes affect A.K.I., Akuma, Chun-Li, Elena, Ryu, Sagat, Terry ** Pushback changes affect Blanka, C. Viper, E. Honda, Guile, Jamie, JP, Juri, Kimberly, Lily, Luke, M. Bison, Mai, Marisa, Rashid, Sagat, Terry * '''{{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} Screen Freeze:''' pressing an Up input during the freeze will now buffer a jump after the screen freeze ends ** Still subject to move priority, like special moves canceling the prejump frames ** Neutral jumps during the freeze will become forward/back jumps if the left/right direction is held after the Up direction ** Only applies if the character is in neutral during the screen freeze (will not be buffered on wakeup or during a move's recovery) * '''Wakeup Input Buffer:''' extended by 3 frames (7f → 10f)
== '''Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|OD|Toxic Blossom}} builds an additional 2000 Drive meter every time it triggers (unless {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} is used during the combo) ** {{clr|L|236LP}} / {{clr|M|236MP}} / 2PP~P: 2000 → 4000 ** {{clr|H|236HP}}: 2500 → 4500 ** {{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} / {{clr|L|214LP}}~{{clr|L|6P}}: 3000 → 5000 ** {{clr|OD|236PP}} / {{clr|OD|214PP}}~{{clr|OD|6P}}: 0 → 2000 * {{clr|L|5LP}} is now chainable into or out of {{clr|L|2LP}}/{{clr|L|2LK}} * {{clr|M|Pu Lao}} ({{clr|M|3MP}}) blockstun 19 → 18; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|L|Hun Dun}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LP}}) hitstun increased 17 → 18, blockstun increased 15 → 16, recovery increased 14 → 15 (hit/whiff) and 16 → 17 (block); {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} cancel occurs 1f later ** No change to Hit/Block advantage or {{clr|DR|DRC}} advantage; indirectly decreases Perfect Parry advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-16}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-17}} and Sinister Slide cancel advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}}/{{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}}/{{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} ** These changes allow {{clr|L|214LP}} to combo from the Target Combo except near max range * {{clr|OD|OD Nightshade Pulse}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) 2nd hit Juggle Increase value decreased 3 → 2 (more lenient after juggling on airborne opponents)
=== '''Akuma''' === * {{clr|M|5MP}} whiff recovery increased 11 → 13; extended hurtbox lasts until end of recovery * {{clr|M|2MK}} hitstun reduced 23 → 22; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|E|0}}; {{clr|DR|DRC}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+11}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+10}} ** Can no longer combo naturally into {{clr|OD|OD Adamant Flame}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) * {{clr|H|2HP}} hitstun increased 27 → 28 on the first 3 active frames; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}; {{clr|DR|DRC}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+17}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+18}} * {{clr|M|Skull Splitter}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) 2nd hit blockstun 20 → 18; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|M|MK Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku}} ({{clr|M|214MK}}) 2nd hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (and removed 1 airborne recovery frame to compensate) ** More consistent in juggles where opponent is launched higher up * {{clr|OD|OD Adamant Flame}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) startup when canceled from {{clr|M|2MK}} increased 18 → 20 to prevent it from comboing * Lv.3 Gou Hadoken (236[P]/{{clr|OD|[PP]}}) hits increased 3 → 4; damage increased 1200 (300x2,600) → 1350 (250x3,600); total chip damage 300 → 336 ** Recovery reduced 28 → 21 (hit/block) / 26 (whiff); total frames are 77(82) meterless / 52(57) {{clr|OD|OD}}; "whiff" means the projectile does not make contact within the first 21 active frames ** Hit Advantage KD +57 → KD +69; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+20}}; Perfect Parry Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+22}}; total blockstun 34 → 42 ** Drive Damage increased 3000 → 4000 (Block) / 7000 → 9000 ({{clr|PC|Punish Counter}}); Drive Gain (meterless version) increased 1000 → 4000; {{clr|SA|Super}} Gain 600 → 800
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|M|5MK}} hitstun 24 → 25; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}}; {{clr|DR|DRC}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+14}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+15}} ** Can now combo into Wild Lift (2PP~P) on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}}; reduced pushback so that {{clr|OD|OD Backstep Roll}} combos more consistently * {{clr|H|2HP}} now knocks down on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}}, {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → (KD +40); can only juggle on airborne connect * {{clr|M|Rock Crusher}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Wild Nail}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) KD Advantage increased KD +23 → KD +30; now KD +2 after ending with Coward Crouch ~ Forward Hop * Surprise Forward Hop throw invincibility on frames 12-22 removed * {{clr|SA|SA2-Enhanced}} Rolling Attack ([4]6P) Drive damage on Block reduced; {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} 7500 → 4000, {{clr|H|HP}} 10000 → 6000 * Blanka-chan Bomb now disappears if Blanka is hit after activating them
=== '''C. Viper''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} active frames 3 → 4 (recovery 17 → 16 to compensate); reduced forward hurtbox on arms during active frames * {{clr|H|5HP}} blockstun 21 → 22; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-2}}; High Jump > {{clr|H|214HP Feint}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} * {{clr|H|5HK}} increased OTG bounce time and reduced horizontal knockback on airborne opponents ** Now juggles into corner {{clr|OD|OD Thunder Dash}} and is more consistent into {{clr|OD|OD Burning Kick}} / {{clr|SA|SA1}} in some routes * {{clr|M|Viper Elbow}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|HP Thunder Dash}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) expanded collision box upward to make it harder for opponents to pass behind C. Viper * Aerial Burning Kick (j.236K) blockstun increased 21 → 22 (normal jump) / 20 → 21 (High Jump); landing recovery when cross-up is blocked increased 13 → 14 ** Min/Max Block Advantage increased by +1f when hitting same-side (highly variable); cross-up block advantages are unchanged ** As a result, High Jump > {{clr|M|Air MK Burning Kick}} is now {{sf6-adv|P|+1 on Block}} when used at the earliest timing (powerful approach tool) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} expanded hitbox upward on the 1st and 2nd hits ** Install Timer now causes {{clr|OD|Tracer Combination}} / {{clr|OD|Knuckled Pursuit}} / {{clr|OD|Double Burn}} to build 3000 Drive gauge on hit/block * {{clr|SA|SA2}} collision box expanded upward (less likely to whiff under opponent) ** Input shortcuts no longer apply when using {{clr|H|HP}} button or after High Jump in order to avoid conflict with {{clr|H|214HP Feint}} execution ** Also shortened the input buffer window in these scenarios and prevents kara-canceling a normal/special into {{clr|SA|SA2}} unless the full {{clr|SA|214214P}} command is properly input
=== '''Cammy''' === * {{clr|H|Delayed Ripper}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) recovery on hit reduced 25 → 20; Juggle Start value reduced 3 → 1; increased juggle height on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} (KD +48 → +52) ** Allows new juggle routes, like {{clr|H|6HK}} > {{clr|DR|DRC~}}{{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}, or {{clr|PC|PC}} {{clr|H|6HK}} > {{clr|L|214LP}}, {{clr|SA|SA1}} * {{clr|H|HK Cannon Spike}} ({{clr|H|623HK}}) increased forward movement on startup (easier to connect the higher-damage early active frames in juggles) * Cannon Strike (j.214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) hitstun/blockstun increased by 2f when connecting on the final 2 active frames before landing (causing a screen shake and reduced pushback) ** Screen shake guarantees a minimum advantage of {{sf6-adv|VP|+10 oH}} / {{sf6-adv|VP|+4 oB}} (or {{sf6-adv|VP|+6 oB}} for {{clr|OD|OD}}) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} active frames on 1st hit increased 3 → 4 (no difference to total frame count)
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|H|Water Lotus Fist}} ({{clr|H|3HP}}) blockstun 16 → 15; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Stance Cancel on Block: {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} into follow-up, {{sf6-adv|VM|-9}} {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} into block * {{clr|M|Snake Strike}} ({{clr|M|Stance MP}}) startup reduced 7 → 6; active frames increased 11 → 12; added 1f extra knockdown time on hit (can now combo from {{clr|H|5HP}}) ** If the first active frame connects, this makes it 1f more unsafe on block ({{sf6-adv|VM|-15}}) while keeping the same knockdown advantage ** Modern Controls: can now hold Up or Down to remain in Serenity Stream stance after recovery * {{clr|L|Forward Strike}} ({{clr|L|Stance LK}}) hitbox expanded forward 0.05 units; Range 1.469(1.443) → 1.519(1.493) * {{clr|OD|Lightning Kick Barrage}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|OD|KK}}) no longer has separate damage scaling applied after {{clr|OD|236KK}} hits * {{clr|L|LK Hazanshu}} ({{clr|L|214LK}}) damage reduced 1000 → 700 and chip damage 250 → 175; active frames increased 2 → 3; recovery reduced 21 → 20 (no change to total duration) ** Reduced horizontal range; removed lower body projectile invincibility on frames 7-18; Juggle Limit increased 1 → 5 (best juggle potential of all her meterless specials) ** Blockstun increased 14 → 18; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-9}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}}; increased pushback on block (safe vs. Burnout and can be spaced safely depending on opponent's 5f punish range) ** Hit effect changed from {{sf6-adv|E|0 oH}} → KD +21 (grounded) and gives a very short ground bounce when juggled on airborne opponents ** Cancel into {{clr|SA|SA3}} no longer combos due to the knockdown (even with juggled ground bounce); can still be useful for chip damage or for reacting to {{clr|DR|DI}} armor * {{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} Hazanshu (214{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}) chip damage corrected 250 → 300
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox above Dee Jay's foot * {{clr|M|2MP}} hitstun 22 → 23; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}}; {{clr|DR|DRC}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+12}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+13}} ** Now links to {{clr|L|5LK}} and combos when canceled into {{clr|M|MP Machine Gun Uppercut}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}); {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|M|2MP}} links to {{clr|H|5HP}} on crouching opponents ** Whiff recovery increased 14 → 15; extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery * {{clr|H|2HP}} expanded the front hurtbox during recovery * {{clr|H|HP Machine Gun Uppercut}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) Super Gain on hit increased 2100 → 2500 and increased the input buffer at the end of recovery * {{clr|OD|OD Machine Gun Uppercut}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) startup reduced 28 → 26; can now combo from {{clr|H|5HP}} or {{clr|H|4HK}} (1st hit) as well as {{clr|PC|PC}}/{{clr|DR|DR}} {{clr|M|2MP}} * {{clr|OD|OD Waning Moon}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) no longer hits standing opponents on the first active frame (gives consistent {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} advantage on tall characters) * Juggling Sway (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~6P~4P) can now cancel the backdash into {{clr|L|~LK}} / {{clr|M|~MK}} / {{clr|H|~HK}} follow-ups for more mixup potential ** Reduced the forward hurtbox on frames 5-17 (normal) / 5-13 ({{clr|OD|OD}}); moves backward earlier on the {{clr|OD|OD}} version
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * Fixed bug where Drive Parry would drain twice as fast after being held for 30 frames * {{clr|M|j.MP}} now puts airborne opponents into a {{sf6-jug|limited juggle}} state when juggled into (but not as an air-to-air) ** Reduced air knockback; Juggle Increase value 1 → 2 (only when juggled into) ** Now cancelable into Drill Kick (j.2K) / Yoga Mummy ({{clr|L|j.2LP}}) on hit (can air-to-air more safely and extend juggle routes after {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Flame}}) ** Increased Juggle Limit 1 → 4 on {{clr|H|j.HP}} / {{clr|H|j.HK}}, 0 → 4 on Drill Kick (j.2K), and 1 → 3 on Yoga Mummy ({{clr|L|j.2LP}}) to capitalize on these juggle conversions * {{clr|M|MP Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|M|63214MP}}) expanded the forward hitbox; Drive Gain increased 2400 → 3000 * {{clr|H|HP Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|H|63214HP}}) expanded the forward hitbox; Drive Gain increased 2700 → 4000 * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|OD|63214PP}}) recovery on hit reduced 24 → 19; reduced air knockdown time by 4f (results in KD Advantage +50 → +51) ** Allows Dhalsim to juggle into an immediate {{clr|M|j.MP}} * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Comet}} ({{clr|OD|j.63214PP}}) Juggle Limit 2,2 → 3,4; Juggle Increase 1,1 → 0,1 (easier to juggle into and more lenient juggle state after comboing into it) ** Increased the input buffer window after landing
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox near Ed's head * {{clr|M|2MK}} whiff recovery increased 17 → 19; extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery ** Forward range reduced on the hitbox that connects on crouching opponents (no difference to max range vs. standing) * {{clr|H|2HK}} hit/block recovery 17 → 19; whiff recovery 17 → 21; Hit Advantage reduced {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}}; Block Advantage reduced {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} ** Proximity guard box starts later, frame 6 → 9 * {{clr|H|Low Smash Combination}} ({{clr|H|2HK}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) can be canceled into Kill Rush (6KK/4KK) on hit only; KD Advantage increased +34 → +38 with higher launch * {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Flicker}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) combo scaling 15% → 20% (e.g. counts as 2 hits of scaling for next attack) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} scaling on {{clr|SA|Super Gain}} 80% → 50% for all further hits of the combo
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|H|Power Stomp}} ({{clr|H|3HK}}) increased pushback on block * Sumo Spirit enhanced Hundred Hand Slap (214P) now performs the final hit on block for all versions, increasing Block Advantage by 4 frames and Drive Damage on block by 3000 * {{clr|L|Enhanced LP Hundred Hand Slap}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|E|0}}; blockstun 30 → 42; Drive Damage on Block 3000 → 6000 * {{clr|M|MP Hundred Hand Slap}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}, Normal/Enhanced) startup reduced 18 → 16 (combos from lights); expanded combo-only hitbox forward from 2nd hit onward for juggle consistency ** Normal version only: increased hit pushback for the final hit ** Enhanced version only: Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-8}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}}; blockstun 41 → 53; Drive Damage on Block 4000 → 7000 * {{clr|H|HP Hundred Hand Slap}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}, Normal/Enhanced) startup reduced 21 → 19; expanded combo-only hitbox forward from 2nd hit onward for juggle consistency ** Enhanced version only: Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-8}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}}; blockstun 53 → 65; Drive Damage on Block 5000 → 8000 * {{clr|OD|Enhanced OD Hundred Hand Slap}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}; blockstun 52 → 60; Drive Damage on Block 5000 → 8000
=== '''Elena''' === * {{clr|M|Handstand Whip 1}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) blockstun 20 → 19; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|H|HK Rhino Horn}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) launches opponent higher; KD +39 → KD +40 ** Allows corner juggle into {{clr|H|HK Scratch Wheel}} and better midscreen oki (KD +2 after {{clr|H|HP Roll}}) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} launches opponent higher; KD +42 → KD +44; can now juggle {{clr|OD|OD Rhino Horn}} off a grounded hit * {{clr|SA|SA2 (Healing)}} health recovery increased 1300 → 1600; now recovers 10000 Drive gauge (1 bar)
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|H|2HP}} can now be canceled on the 1st active frame; Hitconfirm Window: 15f ** {{clr|DR|DRC}} Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+15}} oH / {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} oB; {{clr|SA|SA2}} Cancel Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+18}} oH / {{sf6-adv|VP|+9}} oB * {{clr|M|Full Bullet Magnum}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Spinning Back Knuckle}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) Super Gain increased 500 → 1200 * {{clr|M|Drake Fang}} ({{clr|M|2MK}}~{{clr|M|6MP}}) now maintains the {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} property of the initial {{clr|M|2MK}} (deals Drive damage for both {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} hits) ** {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} now causes a limited juggle OTG bounce on hit (KD +47); Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} reduced 4000 → 2000 * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Blade}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) now has 3 versions depending on button strength that affect the projectile movement speed; added a proximity guard hitbox until end of active frames ** {{clr|L|LP}}+{{clr|M|MP}} Slow / {{clr|L|LP}}+{{clr|H|HP}} Medium / {{clr|M|MP}}+{{clr|H|HP}} Fast * {{clr|SA|SA1}} expanded projectile collision box upward to collide with Sagat's High Tiger Shot
=== '''Jamie''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} hitstun 14 → 16; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}; now combos into {{clr|M|2MK}} out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|M|2MK}} hitbox expanded forward; Range 1.42 → 1.46 * {{clr|H|5HP}} 2nd hit reduced air knockback; 3rd hit increased air knockback time and expanded the combo-only hitbox upward (more consistent in certain juggle routes) * {{clr|M|Falling Star Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Ransui Haze Headbutt}} (DL4 {{clr|H|6HK}}~{{clr|H|4HK}}~P) attack startup reduced 15 → 14; active frames 4 → 5; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-13}}; KD Advantage +32 → +31 ** Cancels from the backstep 1f earlier; combined with faster startup, it now frame traps 4-frame buttons after blocked {{clr|H|6HK}} * DL4 Freeflow Strikes 2nd hit (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~6P) added an extended combo-only hitbox and adjusted pushback to ensure the combo does not drop after the initial hit connects * {{clr|OD|OD Bakkai}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) startup reduced 21 → 18; 1st hit active frames increased 3 → 6; recovery decreased 62 → 59 ** Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-46}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-43}}; final hit launches opponent higher, KD Advantage +12 → +23; Hitconfirm window 74 → 77
=== '''JP''' === * Forward Throw distance from opponent increased in the corner; KD Advantage reduced +24 → +23 ** Corner throw loop is now much weaker; still +1 after dashing or can use {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|M|2MP}} extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HK}} Drive Damage on Block reduced 6000 → 4000 * {{clr|M|Guillotinna}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Zilant}} ({{clr|H|5HK}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) Drive Damage on Block reduced 2500 → 2000 ** Combined with the {{clr|H|5HK}} change, this TC drains 0.25 Drive bars less than before * {{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} Torbalan (236{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}) extended the vertical detection range for the projectile to transition into its attack to prevent whiffing in juggles * Departure: Shadow (214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~{{clr|H|214HP}}) can now be canceled into from {{clr|L|2LK}} / {{clr|M|5MP}} / {{clr|M|2MK}} / {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Hitconfirm windows: {{clr|M|5MP}} 15f / {{clr|M|2MK}} 15f / {{clr|H|5HK}} 18f; no combo from {{clr|L|2LK}} ** The portal can be slightly farther off-screen while allowing the spike projectile to be activated
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|M|Kyosesho}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) now knocks down when juggled into on airborne opponents (no difference when not mid-combo) ** Juggle Increase value 1 → 2 on juggled version; can still only connect in {{sf6-jug|free juggle}} states (e.g. after {{clr|OD|214KK}}) * {{clr|M|Senkai Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Renko Kicks}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) whiff recovery increased 20 → 23; extended foot hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery ** Applies to regular and {{clr|SA|FSE}} version * {{clr|L|LP Tensenrin}} ({{clr|L|623LP}}) 1st hit has a shorter upward launch; 2nd hit has a higher upward launch on airborne opponents ** Added larger combo-only hitbox on 2nd hit; increased 2nd hit {{clr|SA|SA3}} cancel window by 4 frames; total Hitconfirm window 17 → 21 ** These changes make it easier to juggle into both hits of {{clr|L|623LP}} and relaxes the execution requirement for canceling into {{clr|SA|SA3}} * {{clr|OD|OD Fuhajin}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) Juggle Start value 2 → 0 ({{sf6-jug|free juggle}} state); reduced horizontal knockback; added 2-hit combo scaling ** Allows more combo freedom, notably juggling into {{clr|M|6MP}} which also continues the juggle * Ankensatsu ({{clr|M|236MK}} / {{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|L|LK}}{{clr|H|HK}}) blockstun 13 → 15; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-8}}; reduced forward recovery hurtbox on hit/block ** Hitbox expands forward gradually to make it easier to connect on late active frames; max range 2.23 → 2.35 ** {{clr|M|Regular 236MK}} only: proximity guard box starts much earlier, 17f → 5f; increased pushback on block; active frames 2-4 result in a knockdown (KD +24~26) ** {{clr|M|1-Stock 236MK}} only: causes {{sf6-jug|limited juggle}} OTG bounce on airborne opponents (mostly useful for canceling to {{clr|SA|SA3}} in juggle routes) * Go Ohsatsu ({{clr|H|236HK}} / {{clr|OD|236}}{{clr|M|MK}}{{clr|H|HK}}) expanded the collision box upward to make it less likely to whiff under opponents in juggles ** Applies to all boosted or non-boosted versions * {{clr|SA|SA3}} combo-only hitbox expanded upward * Assist Combo 2 (Modern Controls) updated to: ** {{clr|M|2MP}} > {{clr|OD|214KK}}, {{clr|M|6MP}} > {{clr|SA|SA1}} (with Drive meter and at least 1 {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge) ** {{clr|M|2MP}} > {{clr|OD|214KK}}, {{clr|M|6MP}} > {{clr|H|623HP}} (with Drive meter and no {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge)
=== '''Ken''' === * {{clr|M|5MK}} can now be canceled into {{clr|SA|Supers}}; Super Hitconfirm Window 15f; removed 20% Starter scaling * {{clr|H|2HP}} blockstun increased 18 → 21; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-7}} ** {{clr|DR|DRC}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+8}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+11}}; Run~Stop Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-7}}; Drive Damage on Block increased 5000 → 6000 ** {{clr|H|2HP}} > {{clr|H|HK Jinrai}} is now only a 5 frame gap on block and is {{clr|DR|DI-safe}} * Run~Shoryuken (KK~623P) 1st hit Juggle Start / Juggle Increase values 1 → 0; 2nd hit Juggle Start 1 → 2 and Juggle Increase 1 → 2 ** Makes it less likely for the 2nd hit to whiff in a juggle when the 1st hit connects * {{clr|L|Kazekama Shin Kick}} (236K~{{clr|L|6LK}}) damage increased 500 → 600; {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} KD Advantage increased +28 → +32 and now causes a Hard Knockdown * {{clr|OD|OD Senka Snap Kick}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|H|6HK}}) active frames increased 4 → 6; recovery reduced 20 → 18 (no change to total duration) ** More consistent in juggles when the opponent is launched high from the initial {{clr|OD|236KK}} * {{clr|SA|SA2}} now benefits from +20% {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} damage boost, 2800 → 3360; much stronger as a raw punish
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|H|Windmill Kick}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) increased pushback on block * Hidden Variable / Teleport (214P): normals used after reappearing now gain +3 Juggle Limit and cause an air knockdown ** Gives extended juggles similar to {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} without meter cost, and can give stronger Forced Knockdown punishes ** Does not apply to {{clr|H|2HK}} or Command Normals
=== '''Lily''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} startup reduced 11 → 10; head hurtbox invincibility shifted back 1 frame to match (10-35 → 9-34) ** Allows a much more consistent combo from {{clr|PC|PC}} {{clr|L|5LP}} where other moves would whiff or reach the opponent on late active frames * {{clr|H|Ridge Thrust}} ({{clr|H|3HP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|OD|OD Condor Spire}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}, Regular/{{clr|6|Windclad}}) now has two possible travel distances depending on the button combination ** Far: {{clr|M|MK}}+{{clr|H|HK}} / Modern: A[{{clr|DR|3S}}] ** Short: {{clr|L|LK}}+{{clr|M|MK}} or {{clr|L|LK}}+{{clr|H|HK}} / Modern: A[{{clr|DR|1S}}] or A[{{clr|DR|2S}}] *** Can be more easily spaced on later active frames for improved advantage or to remain safe from {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} *** The new Short {{clr|6|Windclad}} version has 8f less KD Advantage compared to the original Far version ** Regular version: recovery reduced 16 → 13; blockstun 21 → 18 (Block Advantage unaffected); KD Advantage +42(54) → +43(55); Perfect Parry Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-27(-15)}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-24(-12)}} * {{clr|6|Windclad}} Condor Dive ({{clr|6|W.}}j.PP/{{clr|OD|PPP}}) can now spend a {{clr|6|Windclad}} stock to perform a follow-up Condor Dive on the hit/block rebound ** Can only be performed once per jump; useful to extend combo damage, or punish the opponent trying to dash or {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} to punish the initial Dive ** The {{clr|OD|OD}} version only costs 1 additional Drive bar regardless of which Condor Dive starter was used; grants a Hard Knockdown on hit for great oki anywhere on screen
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} recovery on block reduced 23 → 22; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}}; Perfect Parry Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-24}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-23}} ** Does not affect blockstring gaps when canceled into specials/{{clr|DR|DR}} * {{clr|M|Rawhide}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|H|Double Impact}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) 2nd hit results in a staggered tailspin (Forces Stand) when the 1st hit connects as a {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} ** Advantage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}}: {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} ({{sf6-adv|VP|+37}} on the cancel frame, allowing a cancel into any fully charged Flash Knuckle); also {{sf6-adv|VP|+28}} after {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} version does not incur the usual 2-hit damage scaling when comboed into * {{clr|L|LP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) recovery reduced 31 → 27; KD Advantage increased +32 → +36; blockstun increased 16 → 18; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-18}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}}; Perfect Parry Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-32}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-28}} ** Reduced horizontal knockback on grounded opponents; the final 2 recovery frames on Hit are special/{{clr|SA|Super}} cancelable (allows corner juggle into {{clr|L|623LP}} or {{clr|SA|SA2}}) ** Reduced knockdown advantage on airborne opponents (to prevent unintended combo routes alongside the other changes) * {{clr|H|Held HP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|H|214[HP]}}) decreased pushback on block for both regular/perfect versions ** On close range hit, Luke is in range for {{clr|L|2LK}}~{{clr|L|2LP}} confirm or a 1-frame microwalk throw (longer microwalk if the opponent walks back)
=== '''M. Bison''' === * {{clr|H|Psycho Hammer}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) increased pushback on block * Psycho Mine Backfist Combo (214P) meterless versions blockstun increased by 3f on all versions; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+9}} ** {{clr|M|Psycho Mine MP Backfist Combo}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}) launches the opponent higher (KD +42 → KD +44); can now juggle into {{clr|H|2HK}} / {{clr|SA|SA1}} / {{clr|SA|SA3}} anywhere on-screen * Devil Reverse ([2]8K~P) forward movement speed reduced when activated in front of the opponent * {{clr|SA|SA2}} startup reduced 26 → 24; full invincibility reduced 1-32 → 1-30; expanded combo-only hitbox upward ** Holding back causes shorter horizontal movement, allowing M. Bison to remain on the same side or hit close range opponents more consistently ** Can now combo from {{clr|H|4HK}} on the ground
=== '''Mai''' === * {{clr|M|Senkotsu Uchi}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|OD|Falling Kachousen Fan}} (after {{clr|OD|236PP}} / {{clr|3|F.}}{{clr|OD|236PP}} / 236[P] / {{clr|3|F.}}236[P]) hitstun reduced 30 → 25 and blockstun reduced 26 → 21 ** Less time to land combos/mixups/pressure when the bouncing fan connects ** Does not affect the falling fans after {{clr|3|F.}}{{clr|OD|236[PP]}} or {{clr|OD|Midare Kachousen}} * Held Kachousen (236[P]) recovery increased 30 → 32 and total 62 → 64; 1st hit blockstun reduced 30 → 28 ** 1st Hit Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}}; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}}; Perfect Parry Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-20}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-22}} ** Can now punish Mai before the bouncing fan connects if used at close range; especially important in corner setups where point blank 236[P] is throw punishable ** At ranges where only a 5-frame normal punishes, canceling into a forward-moving special can avoid the falling fan (character-specific) *** The blockstun change also increases the blockstring gap between the 1st fan and bouncing fan; normal-size characters can Throw to punish a close range {{clr|L|236[LP]}}, but tall characters (Dee Jay, JP, Marisa, Sagat, Zangief) will still get {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} by the bouncing fan; they can instead input a crouching {{clr|M|Medium}}/{{clr|H|Heavy}} normal so that Mai is in hitstun/blockstun while the bouncing fan connects, preventing her from getting a combo and pushing her away * {{clr|OD|OD Kachouesen}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) 1st hit blockstun reduced 28 → 26; Block Advantage (1st hit) {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} ** Can now punish Mai before the bouncing fan connects if used at close range; especially important in corner setups where point blank {{clr|OD|236PP}} is throw punishable ** At ranges where only a 5-frame normal punishes, canceling into a forward-moving special can avoid the falling fan (character-specific) * {{clr|L|LP Ryuuenbu}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}, Normal/{{clr|3|Flame}}) expanded hitbox / projectile clash box / proximity guard box forward; now causes Low Crush 7-14f; extends a forward hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery ** Drive Damage on Block increased 2000 → 4000; Drive Damage on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} increased 2500 → 6000 ** Makes it a much stronger midrange poking tool overall to compensate for Kachousen nerfs * {{clr|H|HP Ryuuenbu}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}, Normal/{{clr|3|Flame}}) 2nd hit launches airborne opponents higher for better juggle follow-ups (e.g. {{clr|PC|PC}} {{clr|H|5HK}}, Dash + {{clr|L|2LP}} > {{clr|H|214HP}}, {{clr|L|236LK}}, corner {{clr|M|623MK}}) ** {{clr|3|Flame Version}}: startup reduced 15 → 14 and first hit active frames increased 3 → 4 to allow combo from {{clr|L|5LP}} (no change to total duration); 1st active frame only connects on grounded opponents * Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (236K) slightly reduced forward movement on hit/block (less corner carry) * Musasabi no Mai (j.214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, Normal/{{clr|3|Flame}}) expanded the combo-only hitbox forward on the 7th active frame onward for juggle consistency
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox near Manon's head * {{clr|H|5HP}} Juggle Limit increased 0 → 1; now works in more juggle routes into {{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} or {{clr|SA|SA2}} ** e.g. air-to-air {{clr|M|j.MP}}, midscreen 236P~K, corner {{clr|OD|236KK}}, corner {{clr|OD|236PP}}~{{clr|OD|K}} > {{clr|H|4HP}} * {{clr|H|5HK}} proximity guard box starts much later (2f → 12f), allowing opponents to walk back out of range more easily * {{clr|M|En Haut}} ({{clr|M|4MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) now maintains the {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} property of the initial {{clr|M|4MK}} (deals Drive damage for both {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} hits) ** Can now combo the full TC into {{clr|L|236LP}} on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} and {{clr|OD|214KK}} on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} ** {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} bonus advantage does not carry though both hits * {{clr|H|Temps Lié}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) active frames increased 2 → 5 (easier to connect in juggles alongside the {{clr|H|5HP}} change) * {{clr|L|LK Rond-point}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) no longer pushes back on a cornered hit vs. airborne opponents * {{clr|L|LK Dégagé}} ({{clr|L|214LK}}) expanded 2nd hit combo-only hitbox for juggle consistency * {{clr|H|HK Dégagé}} ({{clr|H|214HK}}) reduced pushback on hit for more consistent {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}} links
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|M|2MK}} hitstun increased 24 → 25; hit recovery decreased 18 → 17; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} ** Can now combo out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} into {{clr|H|4HP}} or {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|MP}} (close) / {{clr|M|2MP}} (mid) / {{clr|M|6MP}} (far) ** The mid-range link to {{clr|M|2MP}} has inconsistent spacing for cancels; {{clr|L|236LK}} / {{clr|OD|236PP}} / {{clr|SA|Supers}} are the best ender * {{clr|H|5HK}}/{{clr|H|5[HK]}} expanded the forward hurtbox during recovery (easier to whiff punish) * {{clr|M|Novacula 1}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) startup decreased 10 → 9; total animation 31 → 30 ** Now links after {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|M|2MK}} from much farther away than Marisa's other link options * {{clr|H|Malleus Breaker 1}} ({{clr|H|3HP}}) increased pushback on block ** As a result, {{clr|H|Malleus Breaker 2}} ({{clr|H|3HP}}~{{clr|H|3HP}}) whiffs when the first hit is not charged (likely unintentional) * {{clr|L|LP Dimachaerus}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) added a combo-only hitbox to the 1st active frame for combo consistency (can still whiff from long range cancels) * Phalanx (623P) blockstun increased 23 → 24; Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+2(+3)}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}{{sf6-adv|VP|(+4)}}; {{clr|H|623HP}} pushback on block reduced ** After blocked {{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}} versions, this improves: *** Frame traps with {{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LP}} *** Pressure with {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|MP}} (no longer causes air reset if opponent jumps) *** Trade combos vs. 4f normals; use {{clr|M|5MP}} after stand block or {{clr|H|4HP}} after crouch block for trade setup * {{clr|OD|OD Phalanx}} ({{clr|OD|623PP}}) armor box expanded downward; armor time increased 6-12 → 6-17; pushback on block reduced ** Marisa is in command throw range (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|L|LPLK}}) against stationary opponents, but cannot convert after {{clr|L|2LK}}/{{clr|M|2MK}} to threaten a back walk
=== '''Rashid''' ===
* {{clr|H|5HK}} Juggle Start value on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} reduced 5 → 3; can now juggle into moves like {{clr|M|6MP}} or {{clr|L|214LK}} * {{clr|H|Beak Assault}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) increased pushback on block * {{clr|M|MP Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|M|236MP}}) Anti-Air Invincibility increased 6-10 → 6-14 (end of 2nd hit's active frames) * {{clr|OD|OD Whirlwind Shot}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) reduced horizontal blowback distance when hitting a grounded opponent ** Easier to juggle afterward midscreen (can even pick up {{clr|DR|DR}} extensions) * {{clr|OD|Held OD Whirlwind Shot}} ({{clr|OD|236[KK]}}) startup reduced 41 → 38; total animation 76 → 73 ** Can now be canceled into Arabian Cyclone follow-ups: Wing Stroke (4K) / Rolling Assault (6K) on frame 55 (can buffer the input as early as frame 37) ** Roll cancel is {{sf6-adv|VM|-4 oB}} at point blank, massively {{sf6-adv|VP|+ oB}} from farther; also useful to avoid being punished by a jump-in ** 3rd hit launches higher when connecting on airborne opponents (easier to juggle follow-ups if opponent lands into the projectile)

=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|M|5MP}} whiff recovery increased 11 → 13; extended arm/body hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery * {{clr|H|2HP}} 1st active frame extends a combo-only hitbox to have the same range as 2nd active frame (ensures it will be cancelable in grounded combos) * {{clr|M|Collarbone Breaker}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) 2nd hit blockstun 21 → 19; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|H|Solar Plexus Strike}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) proximity guard box starts much later (3f → 17f), allowing opponents to walk back out of range more easily * {{clr|H|High Double Strike}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) launches the opponent higher (KD +36 → KD +39); can juggle into {{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} Shoryuken in the corner ** Denjin Charge cancel KD +7 → KD +10 ** If the {{clr|H|HK}} hits as a {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} (e.g. after Luke's {{clr|OD|236KK}} absorbs the {{clr|H|5HP}}), Ryu is still KD +37 (very rare scenario) * {{clr|L|LP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) Drive Damage on Block reduced 4000 → 2000; increased pushback on block vs. Burnout * {{clr|OD|OD Shoryuken}} ({{clr|OD|623PP}}) 1st active frame extends a combo-only hitbox for combo consistency
=== '''Sagat''' === * {{clr|L|5LK}} reduced pushback on hit for combo consistency * {{clr|M|2MP}} whiff recovery increased 17 → 19 * {{clr|M|Tiger Heavy Elbow}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) blockstun 20 → 19; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}}; increased pushback on block
=== '''Terry''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} whiff recovery increased 14 → 15 * {{clr|H|Hammer Punch}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) blockstun → ; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}}; increased pushback on block * {{clr|L|LK Crack Shoot}} ({{clr|L|214LK}}) increased pushback on block vs. Burnout (weaker looping pressure) * {{clr|H|HP Round Wave}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) decreased pushback on hit * {{clr|OD|OD Power Charge}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) can now cancel into other special moves on hit similar to the {{clr|H|HK}} version ** Especially useful in the corner where {{clr|H|214HK}} can stop opponent from bouncing over his head * {{clr|SA|SA1}} now causes both players to become fully invincible immediately on contact to prevent unintended projectile interactions * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} startup decreased 3 → 2 when canceled from Rising Tackle, Quick Burn, or Burning Knuckle
=== '''Zangief''' === * {{clr|H|Smetana Dropkick}} ({{clr|H|3HK}}) lower body hurtbox reduced during from frame 5 onward (stronger Low Crush) * {{clr|OD|OD Double Lariat}} ({{clr|OD|PPP}}) 4th hit expanded downward with increased pushback on block vs. Burnout; 2nd hit blockstun reduced 17 → 14 with reduced pushback on block ** This allows 3 hits to connect vs. Burnout crouch block for better chip damage, and it can be spaced safely against most punishes due to pushback ** Does not form a true blockstring between the last 2 hits if the opponent crouch blocks outside of Burnout
